turns.text:
Design beginner to advance course to learn everything about below skills. break each skill into multiple sub skills. Recommend top YouTube courses master each sub skill.

1. Book-keeping and Accountancy 
2. Order to cash

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
process 
3. Project Management 

1. Book-keeping and Accountancy
   A. Basic Bookkeeping
      1. Understanding Accounting
      2. Journal Entries
      3. Ledger & Chart of Accounts
      4. Trial Balance
      5. Financial Statements
   B. Advanced Bookkeeping
      1. Adjusting Entries
      2. Depreciation
      3. Bookkeeping for Small Business 
      4. Budgeting and Forecasting
   C. Accounting Software
      1. QuickBooks
      2. XERO
      3. MYOB
      4. Fresh Books
      
   Recommended Courses from YouTube
   Basic:
   1. Basic Bookkeeping: What Is It and Why Do You Need It? - QuickBooks: https://youtu.be/yv5-30NWVd0
   2. Accounting 101: The Basics Introduction -InTechgrity: https://youtu.be/9lXuBhfBpay
   Advanced:
   1. Principles of Accounting - ACDCLeadership: https://youtu.be/XBIV_4r_MBI
   2. Adjusting Entries for Accounting - Simplestudies: https://youtu.be/kJYI4tePKPM
   Accounting Software:
   1. QuickBooks Tutorials for Beginners - FitSmallBusiness: https://youtu.be/MpyrqmnrITo
   2. XERO Tutorial For Beginners - Ecom-Tech Ka Tadka: https://youtu.be/6UdGtAM82_Q
   
2. Order to Cash Process 
   A. Introduction
      1. Order Management
      2. Billing and Invoicing
      3. Credit and Collections
   B. Order Management 
      1. Sales Order Processing
      2. Sales Order Fulfillment
      3. Inventory Management
      4. Delivery Management
   C. Billing and Invoicing 
      1. Fixed and Variable Billing
      2. Invoicing Processing and Payment
      3. Invoice Dispute Management
   D. Credit and Collections 
      1. Credit Policy Management
      2. Credit Scoring and Approval 
      3. Collection process Management
      
   Recommended Courses from YouTube
   Introduction:
   1. What is Order to Cash? - EzeeCLOUD: https://youtu.be/66BSBFvTw7c
   2. Order-to-Cash Process Introduction - TheOpenEdu: https://youtu.be/mO3xgghhbkg
   Order Management:
   1. Order Management in 60 Seconds - OracleERPPro: https://youtu.be/1ZJahlcTTmQ 
   2. Understanding Order Management and Fulfillment - Skubana: https://youtu.be/B5x-QfeCmZg
   Billing and Invoicing:
   1. The Fundamentals of Billing and Invoicing - Entrepreneur: https://youtu.be/J-g73iqJc9M
   2. Best Invoicing & Accounting Softwares Of 2022 - Business Friend: https://youtu.be/ieL3gM3m-28
   Credit and Collections:
   1. Understanding Credit Scoring - FICO: https://youtu.be/xh6Jcb81sKg
   2. How to Improve Your Business Collections Efforts -  Small Business Trends: https://youtu.be/o3-vzX1RBRw
   
3. Project Management
   A. Introduction
      1. Definition and Scope
      2. Project Initiation and Planning
      3. Project Execution and Control
      4. Project Closing
   B. Project Initiation and Planning
      1. Project Charter
      2. Project Scope and Requirements
      3. Project Schedule
      4. Project Budgeting
   C. Project Execution and Control
      1. Project Team Management
      2. Quality Control and Assurance
      3. Risk, Issue, and Change Management
      4. Project Performance Monitoring and Reporting
   D. Project Closing
      1. Project Closure Planning
      2. Final Acceptance and Delivery
      3. Post-Project Review and Lessons Learned
      
   Recommended Courses from YouTube
   Introduction:
   1. Project Management Overview - Project Management Institute: https://youtu.be/cBO1AtzNtb4 
   2. 5 Phases of Project Management - Project Management Simplified: https://youtu.be/_cLhNrUWIB0
   Initiation and Planning:
   1. Project Charter in Project Management - Laura Brandenburg: https://youtu.be/t0qAYsExMOI
   2. How to Create a Project Scope Statement - ProjectManager.com: https://youtu.be/RlTG4h0TvOc
   Execution and Control:
   1. Top _ Essential Project Management Skills - Project Management Simplified: https://youtu.be/zjR6GQuEdhs
   2. How to Control and Monitor Project Progress - Project Management Institute: https://youtu.be/eUa6WuOd_4s
   Closing:
   1. Project Closing: 5 Things You Must Do - ProjectManager.com: https://youtu.be/xOq3yLcdne8
   2. Evaluating Project Success - Project Management Institute: https://youtu.be/httqKjWXMZc
